heroHeadline: IDF Airstrike Kills Five Including Three Children in Beit Lahia; Settler Shoots Dead Third Palestinian in Two Days in Deir Dibwan
heroSubtitle: An Israeli airstrike near Al-Qassam mosque in Beit Lahia, northern Gaza killed five Palestinians including three children on April 23, bringing the post-ceasefire death toll to 792+. A fourth Palestinian — Awda Atef Awawdeh, 25 — was shot dead by Israeli settlers in Deir Dibwan, the third fatal settler killing in two days. The Israeli High Court heard bereaved families' petitions demanding an independent October 7 commission of inquiry. The West Bank Protection Consortium documented 16 settler sexual violence incidents since October 2023, citing structural impunity.
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, Human Rights Watch, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
